title: Exercises
subtitle: Self-discovery and mental-health exercises you can do at any time.

views.noEntriesYet: No entries yet. Complete your first exercise above.
views.noSessionsYet: No sessions yet. Complete your first practice above.
views.habitPromptDescription: Track your consistency with a habit.
views.noMapsYet: No maps yet. Create your first parts map above.
views.noAppreciationsYet: No appreciations yet. Thank a protector above.
views.noWitnessingsYet: No witnessings yet. Begin the exercise above when you feel ready.
views.noCheckInsYet: No check-ins yet. Start your first assessment above.
views.selfEnergyHabitDescription: Build consistency with a habit tracker.
views.noDialoguesYet: No dialogues yet. Start your first parts dialogue above.
views.noConstellationsYet: No constellations yet. Map at least 3 parts first, then explore how they relate.
views.noDirectAccessYet: No sessions yet. Start your first dialogue above.
views.noTrailheadsYet: No trailheads yet. Start by capturing a recent emotional trigger above.
views.dailyCheckInHabitDescription: Build a streak with a habit tracker.
views.noCheckInsYetDaily: No check-ins yet. Pick a quick practice to start.
views.noUnblendingYet: No sessions yet. Complete your first unblending practice above.

valuesDiscovery.title: Values Discovery
valuesDiscovery.subtitle: Identify your core values
valuesDiscovery.description: List people you admire, identify the qualities you value, and distill your core values.

wheelOfLife.title: Wheel of Life
wheelOfLife.subtitle: Assess your life balance
wheelOfLife.description: Define your life areas and rate each one to see where you're aligned and where you have gaps.

shadowBeliefs.title: Shadow Beliefs
shadowBeliefs.subtitle: Surface hidden assumptions
shadowBeliefs.description: Identify self-sabotaging beliefs and reframe them. Not therapy — awareness-building.

transformativePurpose.title: Transformative Purpose
transformativePurpose.subtitle: Define your north star
transformativePurpose.description: Move from curiosity to contribution with a provisional purpose statement.

ipipBfm50.title: IPIP Big Five (50)
ipipBfm50.subtitle: Fast trait baseline
ipipBfm50.description: 50-item Big Five marker assessment with scale means and practical interpretation bands.

ipipNeo120.title: IPIP-NEO (120)
ipipNeo120.subtitle: Deep trait profile
ipipNeo120.description: 120-item Big Five domain assessment with robust missing-data handling and retake tracking.

hexaco60.title: HEXACO (60)
hexaco60.subtitle: Six-factor profile
hexaco60.description: 60-item HEXACO assessment covering Honesty-Humility, Emotionality, and four additional domains.

pvq40.title: PVQ-40 Values
pvq40.subtitle: Motivational priorities
pvq40.description: Portrait Values Questionnaire with MRAT-centered values by default and raw-score toggle.

vlq.title: VLQ Values Alignment
vlq.subtitle: Importance vs consistency
vlq.description: Rate 10 life domains for value importance and living consistency to reveal top values and gaps.

worryTree.title: Worry Tree
worryTree.subtitle: Manage worry in minutes
worryTree.description: Classify your worry as a real problem or hypothetical, then take the right action — plan it or let it go.

cognitiveDistortions.title: Cognitive Distortions
cognitiveDistortions.subtitle: Spot thinking traps
cognitiveDistortions.description: Learn 14 common thinking traps and identify which ones show up in your own thoughts.

thoughtRecord.title: Thought Record
thoughtRecord.subtitle: Restructure negative thoughts
thoughtRecord.description: Walk through a 7-column thought record to examine evidence and develop balanced thinking.

coreBeliefs.title: Core Beliefs
coreBeliefs.subtitle: Explore your deepest beliefs
coreBeliefs.description: Use the Downward Arrow technique to uncover core beliefs and develop balanced alternatives.

compassionateLetter.title: Compassionate Letter
compassionateLetter.subtitle: Write to yourself with kindness
compassionateLetter.description: Voice your inner critic, then respond with the compassion you'd show a good friend.

positiveDataLog.title: Positive Data Log
positiveDataLog.subtitle: Collect evidence against negative beliefs
positiveDataLog.description: An ongoing log to systematically challenge a core belief by recording contradicting evidence over time.

behavioralExperiment.title: Behavioral Experiment
behavioralExperiment.subtitle: Test your beliefs with evidence
behavioralExperiment.description: Design and run real-world experiments to test whether negative beliefs are accurate.

behavioralActivation.title: Behavioral Activation
behavioralActivation.subtitle: Schedule mood-boosting activities
behavioralActivation.description: Plan and track pleasurable and meaningful activities across your week to combat low mood.

structuredProblemSolving.title: Structured Problem Solving
structuredProblemSolving.subtitle: Break down overwhelming problems
structuredProblemSolving.description: Define, brainstorm, evaluate, and plan — a systematic approach when problems feel too big.

gradedExposure.title: Graded Exposure
gradedExposure.subtitle: Build your fear ladder
gradedExposure.description: Create a hierarchy of feared situations from easiest to hardest, then work through them systematically.

threePathways.title: Three Pathways to Meaning
threePathways.subtitle: Map your sources of meaning
threePathways.description: Map what you create, experience, and how you respond to difficulty — the three ways Frankl identified we find meaning.

socraticDialogue.title: Socratic Self-Dialogue
socraticDialogue.subtitle: Discover your own answers
socraticDialogue.description: An LLM-guided conversation that helps you discover your own answers about meaning, values, and purpose.

mountainRange.title: Mountain Range of Meaning
mountainRange.subtitle: Discover your life themes
mountainRange.description: Plot the peaks and valleys of your life to discover the themes that have always mattered to you.

paradoxicalIntention.title: Paradoxical Intention Lab
paradoxicalIntention.subtitle: Break anxiety with humor
paradoxicalIntention.description: Break anxiety cycles by humorously intending the thing you fear. Frankl's technique for when worry makes things worse.

dereflection.title: Dereflection Practice
dereflection.subtitle: Redirect toward meaning
dereflection.description: Redirect attention from a fixation toward meaningful activities. Based on Frankl's self-transcendence concept.

tragicOptimism.title: Tragic Optimism
tragicOptimism.subtitle: Find meaning in difficulty
tragicOptimism.description: Find meaning within suffering, guilt, or awareness of limited time. Professional guidance recommended.

attitudinalShift.title: Attitudinal Shift
attitudinalShift.subtitle: Choose your response
attitudinalShift.description: Transform 'because this happened, I can't...' into 'although this happened, I choose to...' — Frankl's freedom of response.

legacyLetter.title: Legacy Letter
legacyLetter.subtitle: Write your life's meaning
legacyLetter.description: Write a letter about the meaning you want your life to create. Connects all three pathways to meaning.

partsMapping.title: Parts Mapping
partsMapping.subtitle: Map your inner system
partsMapping.description: Create a visual map of your inner parts — their roles, fears, and relationships. The foundation for all IFS work.

unblending.title: Unblending Quick Practice
unblending.subtitle: Create space from parts
unblending.description: Practice creating distance between your Self and an activated part. A core IFS skill for daily use.

directAccess.title: Direct Access Dialogue
directAccess.subtitle: Talk to your parts
directAccess.description: Speak directly to a part through LLM-assisted dialogue. Learn its perspective, fears, and positive intentions.

trailhead.title: Trailhead Journal
trailhead.subtitle: Follow emotional triggers
trailhead.description: Use emotional triggers as entry points to discover and understand your parts over time.

protectorAppreciation.title: Protector Appreciation
protectorAppreciation.subtitle: Thank your protectors
protectorAppreciation.description: Build a relationship with a protector part by understanding its job and thanking it for its effort.

exileWitnessing.title: Exile Witnessing
exileWitnessing.subtitle: Approach with compassion
exileWitnessing.description: Gently approach a vulnerable part with compassion. Professional guidance recommended.

selfEnergy.title: Self-Energy (8 C's)
selfEnergy.subtitle: Strengthen your Self
selfEnergy.description: Strengthen your connection to Self through daily check-ins with the 8 C's framework.

partsDialogue.title: Parts Dialogue Journal
partsDialogue.subtitle: Write to your parts
partsDialogue.description: Write a structured conversation between Self and a part, with optional AI assistance when stuck.

dailyCheckIn.title: Daily IFS Check-In
dailyCheckIn.subtitle: Quick daily practice
dailyCheckIn.description: Quick daily micro-practices to stay connected to your inner system.

constellation.title: Inner System Constellation
constellation.subtitle: Map part relationships
constellation.description: Map the dynamic relationships between your parts — alliances, conflicts, and hidden connections. Professional guidance recommended.
